uplink.description: Status report, no leak (synthetic in-bounds; temp 25.38 C, humidity 68%, leak OFF)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input; expected measurement values cross-checked against the upstream Apache-2.0 decoder (Volt 3.6, Temp 25.38, Humi 68, Status OFF).

uplink.description: Status report, leak detected (synthetic in-bounds; temp 22.5 C, humidity 55%, leak ON)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input; expected measurement values cross-checked against the upstream Apache-2.0 decoder (Volt 3, Temp 22.5, Humi 55, Status ON).

uplink.description: Low battery + leak, humidity at upper bound (synthetic in-bounds; temp 5 C, humidity 100%, low battery 2.5 V, leak ON)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input exercising the low-battery flag (byte3 high bit) and humidity upper bound; measurement values cross-checked against the upstream Apache-2.0 decoder (Volt 2.5 low battery, Temp 5, Humi 100, Status ON).

uplink.description: Negative temperature, humidity at lower bound (synthetic in-bounds; temp -12.34 C, humidity 0%, leak OFF)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input exercising two's-complement negative temperature and humidity lower bound; measurement values cross-checked against the upstream Apache-2.0 decoder (Volt 3.3, Temp -12.34, Humi 0, Status OFF).

uplink.description: Startup/device-info frame carries no measurement (synthetic; report type 0x00)
uplink._note: Synthetic device-info frame (byte2 == 0x00); the upstream decoder emits Device/SWver/HWver/Datecode metadata only, which is not a normalized measurement.

uplink.description: Config response on fPort 7 is unsupported (synthetic)
uplink._note: Synthetic config-report response; fPort 7 carries configuration acknowledgements, not a measurement.
